title: Spirit Void
content:
This level is a sublimation of the soul.

Cultivators who achieve this realm will experience changes in their Origin Soul, which will then fuse with their innate soul as a living being. The Origin Soul will transform to a Spirit Soul as a result of this.

If the cultivator was using Joss Flames to breakthrough to the Third Step, their Joss Flame Realm will fuse with them at this level, granting them the ability to trap foes inside of it during battle. Naturally, this fusion is a choice however and it can be refused.

If they however do not use Joss Flames, an empty and flexibly transformative world will be born inside of them to compensate. Furthermore these Cultivators will reach the peak of Spirit Void at 8 Essences rather than just power boosting the same Essence.

The cultivator's Origin Energy will also transform into Spirit Energy, however this Spiritual Energy and the Spiritual Energy that First Step Cultivators absorb is different. It is a transformation of Joss Flames, not an innate force of nature.

The Biggest difference between Sprit Void and Nirvana Void is the Joss flame world that normal cultivators make is now internal to them. Sprit Void cultivators create an internal dimension that can force outsiders to worship them as Joss flame souls. this world helps with the breakthrough to Arcane Void. It involved converting the Joss Flames into Nirvana Power, then fusing it with their will, and finally changing their origin soul into their own world. The Joss Flame souls would become the residents of this world, and they would give birth to this spiritual force!

That is to say, each Spirit Void cultivator was like a world! They were each their own separate worlds!
